top_signals.title: Hormuz Oil and Gas Shipments Accelerate After Deal Enters Force
top_signals.summary: A growing stream of stranded oil is making its way out of the Strait of Hormuz while empty Iranian vessels rush in, as the US-Iran interim peace deal sparks one of the biggest days of activity since the conflict began.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Florida man pleads guilty for promoting $1.8B ‘HyperFund’ crypto fraud
top_signals.summary: Rodney “Bitcoin Rodney” Burton faces a maximum sentence of five years in federal prison for conspiracy to operate an unlicensed money transmitting business.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: India Monsoon Starts Almost 40% Short as El Niño Curbs Rains
top_signals.summary: India’s monsoon has had an unusually weak start and the lackluster rainfall is likely to persist, threatening crops and industrial activity as the El Niño weather phenomenon takes hold.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Netherlands Seizes 800 Servers, Arrests 2 for Aiding Cyberattacks
top_signals.summary: Authorities in the Netherlands have arrested the co-owners of two related Internet hosting companies for operating IT infrastructure used by Russia to carry out cyberattacks, influence operations and disinformation campaigns inside the European Union. The two men were the focus of a 2025 KrebsOnSecurity story about how their hosting companies had assumed control over the technical infrastructure of Stark Industries Solutions, an Internet service provider sanctioned last year by the EU as a frequent staging ground for cyber mischief from Russia's intelligence agencies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Telegram admits it couldn't police exam-leak channels, India tells court
top_signals.summary: India's government has told the Delhi High Court that Telegram was warned about two weeks before it was blocked, and that the platform admitted it could not proactively detect the channels selling leaked exam papers. Telegram says it cooperated and the ban is unlawful. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Women have better retirement savings habits but lower 401(k) balances than men, Vanguard finds
top_signals.summary: While women tend to save more of their paycheck for retirement, they have lower 401(k) balances due to other factors, including wages that trail men's earnings.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
